name: Canton Network
description: The privacy-enabled interoperable blockchain network built on Daml smart contracts, enabling seamless cross-application transactions.

name: Canton Foundation
description: The non-profit foundation governing the Canton Network, managing the Global Synchronizer and Canton Coin (CC) ecosystem.

name: Digital Asset
description: The company behind Daml and Canton, providing smart contract infrastructure for institutional blockchain applications.

name: Loop Wallet
description: A self-custodial Canton wallet by Five North enabling users to hold CC, CBTC, and USDCx with seamless dApp connectivity.

name: Bron
description: A Canton Network wallet with built-in token management, staking delegation, and ecosystem exploration features.

name: Temple
description: An institutional-grade decentralized exchange on Canton Network offering order-book trading for CC, CBTC, and USDCx pairs.

name: ACME
description: An automated market maker (AMM) and liquidity protocol on Canton enabling efficient token swaps and LP positions.

name: Alpend
description: A decentralized lending and borrowing protocol on Canton Network, supporting CC and CBTC collateral with variable rate positions.

name: Denex
description: A decentralized exchange aggregator on Canton Network that routes trades across multiple liquidity sources for optimal execution.

name: BitSafe / CBTC
description: Issuer of CBTC, the canonical Bitcoin-backed token on Canton Network, enabling BTC holders to participate in Canton DeFi.

name: USDCx (Circle)
description: Circle's USDC representation on Canton Network providing regulated stablecoin liquidity for DeFi and trading.

name: Brale
description: Stablecoin infrastructure provider powering compliant fiat on/off-ramps and stablecoin issuance on Canton Network.

name: Hashnote USYC
description: Hashnote's US Yield Coin (USYC) on Canton, a tokenized short-duration US Treasury product for institutional yield.

name: Cantonscan
description: The primary block explorer for Canton Network, providing transaction search, validator stats, and network analytics.

name: CC View
description: A Canton Network explorer and analytics platform by PixelPlex with APIs for price data, validators, and on-chain metrics.

name: DecParty
description: A Canton identity and party management solution enabling decentralized governance participation and validator coordination.

name: Franklin Templeton Benji
description: Franklin Templeton's tokenized money market fund (FOBXX) brought to Canton Network via the Benji platform.

name: DTCC
description: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation participating in Canton Network for institutional post-trade infrastructure.

name: Goldman Sachs
description: Goldman Sachs Digital Assets division participating in Canton Network for tokenized asset settlement and interoperability.

name: Paxos
description: Regulated blockchain infrastructure company providing tokenization and settlement technology integrated with Canton Network.

name: Archax
description: FCA-regulated digital asset exchange and custodian operating on Canton Network for institutional digital securities.

name: Splice
description: The core infrastructure layer for Canton providing the Global Synchronizer, wallet kernel, and amulet protocol for CC.

name: Zoro Wallet
description: A Canton wallet with API-first design for developers, supporting CC, CBTC, and programmatic token transfers.

name: Daml
description: The smart contract language powering Canton Network, designed for privacy-preserving multi-party workflows.

name: Global Synchronizer
description: The shared sequencing layer of Canton Network ensuring atomic transaction ordering and finality across all participants.

name: Broadridge
description: Global fintech company leveraging Canton Network for distributed ledger-based securities processing and repo agreements.

name: Cboe Digital
description: Cboe's digital asset marketplace participating in Canton Network for compliant institutional digital asset trading.

name: Deloitte
description: Big Four consultancy involved in Canton Network ecosystem for enterprise blockchain advisory and integration services.

name: Moody's
description: Global credit rating agency exploring Canton Network for transparent, on-chain credit assessment and data feeds.

name: S&P Global
description: Financial intelligence company participating in the Canton Network for institutional data interoperability and tokenized markets.

name: Alchemy
description: Web3 developer platform providing node infrastructure, APIs, and analytics for Canton Network developers.

name: PixelPlex
description: Blockchain development studio building explorer and analytics tools for Canton Network including CC View.

name: Five North
description: The team behind Loop Wallet, building self-custodial wallet infrastructure and the Splice Wallet Kernel SDK for Canton.

name: Vala
description: Canton Network staking and delegation platform enabling CC holders to earn rewards through validator participation.

name: Noves
description: Transaction enrichment and human-readable transaction interpretation API integrated with Canton Network.
